visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a bright title screen featuring a large Costco Wholesale logo and the cartoon character Ralph. Bold purple and red text in Chinese announces a weekly special report against a blurred warehouse background. (2) A rapid montage begins, showcasing various food products on Costco shelves. It starts with trays of blueberry yogurt, then transitions to Ora2 toothpaste and Melano CC facial cleanser tubes in yellow packaging. Each shot is a tight close-up under bright supermarket lighting. (3) The sequence continues with bakery items like strawberry shortcakes and tiramisu stored in plastic containers. The camera then cuts to stacks of Mayflower kitchen towels and bags of Power Up Trail Mix, maintaining a fast-paced, high-information visual style. (4) Further products include Pringles chip boxes, coffee rolls, and dried apple slices. A single hand is briefly seen at 00:33 reaching for a box of Ritz crackers, the only human interaction with the environment. Backgrounds consistently show industrial shelving. (5) The final segment displays bulk packs of honey milk, yogurt, and chilled items like udon and kimchi. The video concludes with household beverages including Starbucks coffee beans, Milkis soda cans, and various alcoholic drinks such as Kirin beer and red wine bottles, each with yellow price overlays.

(3) [Slogan]: ORA2 ME 亮白香氛牙膏 原價399 -80 特價319 日本口妝美. (4) [Slogan]: MELANO CC 酵素深層清潔洗面乳 原價399 -80 特價319. (5) [Slogan]: 新鮮草莓千層蛋糕 原價399 -50 特價349. (6) [Slogan]: 提拉米蘇 原價259 -50 特價209. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One hand is briefly visible at 00:33, but no faces or full bodies are shown.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: No main character visible except for a single hand reaching for product boxes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of industrial warehouse shelving, price tags, and large pallets of goods typical of a Costco wholesale warehouse.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator introducing the Costco weekly report in Traditional Chinese. His delivery is extremely fast and enthusiastic, set against a constant, upbeat electronic pop background track with a prominent synth beat. (2) As the products cycle visually, the narrator rapidly lists each item name and its discounted price. There are no significant pauses; the speech is a continuous stream of information. The BGM maintains a steady 128 BPM tempo throughout, providing a consistent rhythmic floor. (3) The vocal intensity remains high and persuasive, peaking during price reveals. The recording quality is studio-clean with no environmental noise or SFX interference. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic pitch for the last alcoholic products, ending abruptly with the music without a fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional guide to inform viewers of specific weekly discounts available at Costco Taiwan from June 2nd to June 8th. By using a rapid-fire visual montage and high-energy narration, it creates a sense of urgency and excitement around the deals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to promoting specific products and prices at a single retail location (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical social media shopping guide characterized by extremely high information density and fast cuts to maintain viewer engagement.
